label: content
narrative: Content page covering 表計算ソフト terms (ワークシート, セル, 列, 行, セル番地) plus cell-formula explanation. All six table rows and all six redundant term entities have JP text exactly matching OCR. The inline spreadsheet table (B2+C2+D2 example) is present in OCR but not extracted as a structured entity — this is expected scope behaviour for formula-example tables. No dropout, no phantom content.
